title: verilog: fix sizing of ports with int types in module headers

features.name: integer type port in module header
features.description: Code should include a module with an integer type (byte, shortint, integer) port declared directly in the module header

features.name: byte type port in module header
features.description: Code should include a module with byte type port declared in the module header and assigned to a 32-bit extended output

features.name: shortint type port in module header
features.description: Code should include a module with shortint type port declared in the module header and assigned to a 32-bit extended output
